message:
feat(net): add sort_socket_addrs to preserve per-address ports in Happy Eyeballs

Replace the IP-only sort + uniform port reconstruction with a new
sort_socket_addrs() that interleaves IPv6/IPv4 SocketAddr values while
preserving each address's original port. This fixes incorrect behavior
when addresses have heterogeneous ports (e.g., port 443 vs 8443).

The connect() entry point now calls sort_socket_addrs() directly instead
of extracting IPs, sorting, and reconstructing with a single port.
Adds test verifying port preservation across mixed-family addresses.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
